questions.explanation: Microorganisms are too small to be seen with naked eye. They require a microscope to be visible.

questions.text: Bacteria are used in making curd.
questions.explanation: Lactobacillus bacteria convert milk into curd. This is a beneficial use of microorganisms.

questions.correctAnswer: Medicines that kill or stop growth of disease-causing microorganisms.
questions.explanation: Antibiotics like penicillin, streptomycin are produced by bacteria and fungi to kill harmful microbes.

questions.text: The process of conversion of sugar into alcohol is called ________.
questions.explanation: Fermentation is the process where yeast converts sugar into alcohol and carbon dioxide.
